name: Maha Energy AB (publ)
summary: Maha Energy AB (publ), an independent and international oil and gas company, engages in the exploration, development, and production of crude oil and natural gas in the United States, Brazil, and Sweden. The company owns a 75% working interest in the Tartaruga Block that covers 13,201 acres located in the Sergipe Alagoas Basin of Brazil; 99% interest in LAK Ranch heavy oil field, which covers 6,475 acres situated on the eastern edge of the prolific Powder River Basin in Wyoming, the United States; and 100% working interests in six onshore concession agreements, including the oil producing Tie field covering an area of 41,606 acres located in the Reconcavo Basin of Brazil. As of December 31, 2019, it had proven and probable reserves of 39.750 million barrels of oil. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
